metadata.title: Clear Unused Images Plus
metadata.description: Clear Unused Images Plus Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want ribbon icon for clearing the images.
ast.target: 开启此选项可在功能区添加用于清除图片的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn off if you dont want to view the delete logs modal to pop up after deletion is completed. It wont appear if no image is deleted
ast.target: 关闭此选项可避免在删除完成后弹出删除日志模态框。如果没有图片被删除，则不会弹出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run the unused image cleanup once after the vault layout is ready. This setting only applies to images and starts working on the next vault load. Permanent delete will still ask for confirmation.
ast.target: 在保险库布局准备就绪后，自动运行一次未使用图片清理。此设置仅适用于图片，并在下次加载保险库时生效。永久删除仍会要求确认。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run the unused image cleanup every X minutes while Obsidian stays open. The timer starts after the vault layout is ready, waits for the full interval before the first run, and does not run when permanently delete is selected.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 保持打开期间，每隔 X 分钟自动运行一次未使用图片清理。计时器在保险库布局准备就绪后启动，在首次运行前等待完整间隔，且当选择永久删除时不运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After unused images are deleted, also remove folders that became empty. This applies to manual and automatic image cleanup.
ast.target: 在未使用图片被删除后，同时移除变为空的文件夹。此设置适用于手动和自动图片清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how many minutes the plugin waits between automatic image cleanup runs. Minimum: 1 minute.
ast.target: 选择插件在自动图片清理运行之间等待的分钟数。最小值：1 分钟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select where you want images to be moved once they are deleted
ast.target: 选择删除图片后希望将其移至的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Provide the full path of the folder names (case sensitive) divided by comma (,) to be excluded from clearing.
					I.e. For images under personal/files/puhhh -> personal/files/puhhh should be used for exclusion
ast.target: 提供需要排除的文件夹完整路径（区分大小写），用逗号（,）分隔。\n\t\t\t\t\t例如：对于位于 personal/files/puhhh 下的图片，应使用 personal/files/puhhh 进行排除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want to also exclude all subfolders of the folder paths provided above.
ast.target: 开启此选项可同时排除上述文件夹路径下的所有子文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保险库加载时清理图片

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每隔 X 分钟清理图片

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Clear empty folders after image cleanup
ast.target: 图片清理后清除空文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 已删除图片的目标位置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 排除的文件夹完整路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only excluded empty folders were found. Nothing was deleted.
ast.target: 仅发现已排除的空文件夹。未删除任何内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No empty folders found. Nothing was deleted.
ast.target: 未找到空文件夹。未删除任何内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Periodic cleanup is disabled while permanently delete is selected.
ast.target: 当选择永久删除时，定期清理功能将被禁用。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 清理未使用的图片及日志

ast.name: text
ast.source: These files are about to be processed by clear unused attachments. Review the exact paths before continuing.
ast.target: 这些文件即将被“清理未使用的附件”功能处理。请在继续前检查确切路径。
